package_name: 五参数贴合式刻度层真机修正

preview_tap_dismiss.strategy: When inline controls are expanded, the first preview tap dismisses controls and is consumed before tap focus. When controls are closed, preview tap continues to focus/meter.

pointer_and_tick_alignment.offset_fix: selected tick offset subtracts tickSpacing / 2 so the tick center aligns with the fixed center pointer

tint_protection.tint_reset_contract: RESET only; does not call applyWhiteBalanceAuto

xcodebuild.command: xcodebuild -project /Users/sungning/Projects/SellerCamera/SellerCamera.xcodeproj -scheme SellerCamera -configuration Debug -destination "generic/platform=iOS Simulator" CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build

device_run.reason: No device execution was performed in this package.

known_risks: Preview tap dismissal needs real-device confirmation because the original failure was observed on device.
Pointer and tick geometry is fixed in code, but final visual micro-alignment may still require a device screenshot pass.
Ruler label density was only lightly tuned, not redesigned.
